name: com.efyv.bclcompat
description: Precompiled .NET base-class-library assemblies that Unity's scripting profile does not ship but EFYVBackend.Core requires: System.Text.Json 8.0.5 and its dependency closure (System.Text.Encodings.Web 8.0.0, System.Runtime.CompilerServices.Unsafe 6.0.0, Microsoft.Bcl.AsyncInterfaces 8.0.0), plus EFYV.ZLibCompat providing System.IO.Compression.ZLibStream (source in ZLibCompatSource~). System.Buffers, System.Memory, and System.Threading.Tasks.Extensions are intentionally absent: Unity already provides those facades.
